cycleConfirmationGate.description: AskUserQuestion prompt inserted between bug-hunt cycles asking whether to continue or stop. If stopped, all accumulated findings are preserved.

earlyExitWithFindings.description: When user declines cycle continuation, writes all accumulated findings from completed cycles to REVIEW-BUGS.md before exiting.

no-runaway-cycles.description: Bug-hunt must not start cycle 2 or cycle 3 without explicit user confirmation via AskUserQuestion.

preserve-partial-findings.description: Early exit from bug-hunt cycles must preserve all findings from completed cycles in REVIEW-BUGS.md. No data loss on early termination.

definition.scope: Add user confirmation gates between bug-hunt review cycles to prevent runaway automatic cycling. Implement early-exit that preserves accumulated findings.

tasks.description: Add AskUserQuestion confirmation gate between bug-hunt cycles
tasks.acceptance: User is prompted before each subsequent cycle starts

tasks.description: Implement early-exit path that writes all accumulated findings to REVIEW-BUGS.md
Add retry-on-failure confirmation to unit-test skill if appropriate
tasks.acceptance: Unit-test prompts user before retrying on failure

acceptance: Bug-hunt prompts for confirmation between cycles
Early exit preserves all accumulated findings
